CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On The Ground Of Inconvenient Forum
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WORLD FUEL SERVICES, INC. Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On The Ground Of Inconvenient Forum. Off calendar. A Notice of Settlement was filed on June 12, 2012. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2012 Continued To Jul-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On The Ground Of Inconvenient Forum
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Continued To Jun-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lucas V. Munoz, Esq., of Littler Mendelson, PC, Tel. 415.677.3195, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Stephen H. Dye, Esq., of Schnader Harrison Segal & Lewis LLP, Tel. 415.364.6713, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WORLD FUEL SERVICES, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss Or Stay On The Ground Of Inconvenient Forum is continued to June 13, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Further opposition due by 5/25/12; further reply due by 6/08/12. All courtesy copies must be delivered to Department 302 no later than 4PM on 6/08/12. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Carol Haraburda CSR # 8052

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Continued To Jun-01-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
